heading: Sun grant program
label: 8114 Sun grant program

children.text: to enhance national energy security through the development, distribution, and implementation of biobased energy technologies;
to promote diversification in, and the environmental sustainability of, agricultural production in the United States through biobased energy and product technologies;
to promote economic diversification in rural areas of the United States through biobased energy and product technologies; and

children.label: A
children.text: the Department of Agriculture;

children.label: B
children.text: other appropriate Federal agencies (as determined by the Secretary); and

children.label: C
children.text: land-grant colleges and universities.

children.heading: North-central center
children.label: A North-central center
children.text: A north-central sun grant center for the region composed of the States of Illinois, Indiana, Iowa, Minnesota, Montana, Nebraska, North Dakota, South Dakota, Wisconsin, and Wyoming.

children.label: i
children.text: the States of Alabama, Florida, Georgia, Kentucky, Mississippi, North Carolina, South Carolina, Tennessee, and Virginia;

children.label: ii
children.text: the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico; and

children.label: iii
children.text: the United States Virgin Islands.

children.heading: South-central center
children.label: C South-central center
children.text: A south-central sun grant center for the region composed of the States of Arkansas, Colorado, Kansas, Louisiana, Missouri, New Mexico, Oklahoma, and Texas.

children.label: i
children.text: the States of Alaska, Arizona, California, Hawaii, Idaho, Nevada, Oregon, Utah, and Washington; and

children.label: ii
children.text: insular areas (as defined in (other than the insular areas referred to in clauses (ii) and (iii) of subparagraph (B))).section 3103 of this title

children.heading: Northeastern center
children.label: E Northeastern center
children.text: A northeastern sun grant center for the region composed of the States of Connecticut, Delaware, Massachusetts, Maryland, Maine, Michigan, New Hampshire, New Jersey, New York, Ohio, Pennsylvania, Rhode Island, Vermont, and West Virginia.

children.heading: Western insular Pacific subcenter
children.label: F Western insular Pacific subcenter
children.text: A western insular Pacific sun grant subcenter for the region of Alaska, Hawaii, Guam, American Samoa, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, the Federated States of Micronesia, the Republic of the Marshall Islands, and the Republic of Palau.

children.heading: Centers
children.label: A Centers
children.text: In providing any funds made available under subsection (g), the Secretary shall distribute the grants in equal amounts to the sun grant centers described in subparagraphs (A) through (E) of paragraph (1).

children.heading: Subcenter
children.label: B Subcenter
children.text: The sun grant center described in paragraph (1)(D) shall allocate a portion of the funds received under paragraph (1) to the subcenter described in paragraph (1)(F) pursuant to guidance issued by the Secretary.

children.heading: Failure to comply with requirements
children.label: 3 Failure to comply with requirements
children.text: If the Secretary finds on the basis of a review of the annual report required under subsection (f) or on the basis of an audit of a sun grant center or subcenter conducted by the Secretary that the center or subcenter has not complied with the requirements of this section, the sun grant center or subcenter shall be ineligible to receive further grants under this section for such period of time as may be prescribed by the Secretary.

children.label: i
children.text: eligible to receive grants under subsection (b)(7) of ; andsection 3157 of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: located in the region covered by the sun grant center or subcenter.

children.heading: Activities
children.label: B Activities
children.text: Grants described in subparagraph (A) shall be used by the grant recipient to conduct, in a manner consistent with the purposes described in subsection (a), multi-institutional and integrated, multistate research, extension, and education programs on technology development and technology implementation.

children.label: I
children.text: seek and accept proposals for grants;

children.label: II
children.text: determine the relevance and merit of proposals through a system of peer review similar to that established by the Secretary pursuant to ; andsection 7613 of this title

children.label: III
children.text: award grants on the basis of merit, quality, and relevance to advancing the purposes of this section.

children.heading: Priority
children.label: ii Priority
children.text: A sun grant center or subcenter shall give a higher priority to programs that are consistent with the plan approved by the Secretary under subsection (d).

children.heading: Term
children.label: iii Term
children.text: A grant awarded by a sun grant center or subcenter shall have a term that does not exceed 5 years.

children.heading: In general
children.label: I In general
children.text: Except as provided in subclauses (II) and (III), as a condition of receiving a grant under this paragraph, the sun grant center or subcenter shall require that not less than 20 percent of the cost of an activity described in subparagraph (B) be matched with funds, including in-kind contributions, from a non-Federal source.

children.heading: Exclusion
children.label: II Exclusion
children.text: Subclause (I) shall not apply to fundamental research (as defined in subsection (f)(1) of (as added by section 7511(a)(4)) .section 6971 of this title1So in original. Probably should be followed by a third closing parenthesis.1

children.heading: Reduction
children.label: III Reduction
children.text: The sun grant center or subcenter may reduce or eliminate the requirement for non-Federal funds under subclause (I) for applied research (as defined in subsection (f)(1) of (as added by section 7511(a)(4)) if the sun grant center or subcenter determines that the reduction is necessary and appropriate pursuant to guidance issued by the Secretary.section 6971 of this title1

children.heading: Buildings and facilities
children.label: v Buildings and facilities
children.text: Funds made available for grants shall not be used for the construction of a new building or facility or the acquisition, expansion, remodeling, or alteration of an existing building or facility (including site grading and improvement and architect fees).

children.heading: Limitation on indirect costs
children.label: vi Limitation on indirect costs
children.text: A sun grant center or subcenter may not recover the indirect costs of making grants under subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Administrative expenses
children.label: 2 Administrative expenses
children.text: A sun grant center or subcenter may use up to 4 percent of the funds described in subsection (b) to pay administrative expenses incurred in carrying out paragraph (1).

children.label: A
children.text: research, extension, and educational programs on technology development; and

children.label: B
children.text: integrated research, extension, and educational programs on technology implementation.

children.heading: Plan for research activities to be funded
children.label: d Plan for research activities to be funded

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to the availability of funds under subsection (g), and in cooperation with land-grant colleges and universities and private industry, the sun grant centers and subcenter shall jointly develop and submit to the Secretary for approval a plan for addressing the bioenergy, biomass, and bioproducts research priorities of the Department of Agriculture and other appropriate Federal agencies at the State and regional levels.

children.heading: Funding
children.label: 2 Funding
children.text: Funds described in subsection (c)(2) shall be available to carry out planning coordination under paragraph (1).

children.heading: Use of plan
children.label: 3 Use of plan
children.text: The sun grant centers and subcenter shall use the plan described in paragraph (1) in making grants under subsection (c)(1).

children.heading: Grant Information Analysis Center
children.label: e Grant Information Analysis Center
children.text: The sun grant centers and subcenter shall maintain a Sun Grant Information Analysis Center at the sun grant center specified in subsection (b)(1)(A) to provide the sun grant centers and subcenter with analysis and data management support.
the results of all peer and merit review procedures conducted pursuant to subsection (c)(1)(C)(i); and
a description of progress made in facilitating the priorities described in subsection (d)(1).

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: g Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $75,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2008 through 2023, of which not more than $4,000,000 for each fiscal year shall be made available to carry out subsection (e).
